texto: Eventually, what you're looking for is gonna happen, and by the time it does happen, you'll be that much better along the way to what you should be. Don't get discouraged, and just keep on plugging along, and what you want will eventually be yours. You know, there's nothing to stop it if you just keep on working hard. And by working hard, I mean doing the best job you possibly can. Everything happens for the best, and I believe it completely.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Bob Crane sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Eventually, what you're looking for is gonna happen, and by the time it does happen, you'll be th…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, bob-crane, hard-work, útil em momentos de trabalho e hard-work.

frase_original: Eventually, what you're looking for is gonna happen, and by the time it does happen, you'll be that much better along the way to what you should be. Don't get discouraged, and just keep on plugging along, and what you want will eventually be yours. You know, there's nothing to stop it if you just keep on working hard. And by working hard, I mean doing the best job you possibly can. Everything happens for the best, and I believe it completely.
